questions.question:
다음 밑줄 친 단어의 뜻으로 가장 적절한 것은?
He is a very famous singer and has a lot of fans.
다음 중 두 단어의 의미 관계가 나머지 셋과 다른 것은?

다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 가장 적절한 것은?
Kate is good at skating, but she 	 good at skiing.

다음 대화의 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 가장 적절한 것을 고르시오.
A : How 	 do you play basketball?
B : Three times a week.

다음 대화의 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 가장 적절한 것을 고르시오.
A : Tom, what are you doing?
B : Mom, I’m 	 for my math textbook. I can’t
find it.
A : Why don’t you check under the bed?

다음 대화의 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 가장 적절한 것을 고르시오.
A : Jessica, how about going to the flower festival today?
B : Sure, Dad. What time do you want to go?
A : 	.
choices: ④ Let’s leave home at 2 o’clock

questions.question:
다음 빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 말로 가장 적절한 것은?
◦ He looks 	 his father.
◦ What do you 	 to do during the vacation?

다음 대화에서 A가 찾아가려는 곳의 위치로 옳은 것은?
A : Excuse me. How do I get to the post office?
B : Go straight one block and turn left. It’s on your right.
A : Thank you.
choices: ① 직진 후 좌회전하여 오른쪽에 있다.
② 직진 후 우회전하여 왼쪽에 있다.
③ 좌회전 후 직진하여 오른쪽에 있다.
④ 우회전 후 직진하여 왼쪽에 있다.

questions.question:
그림으로 보아 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 가장 적절한 것은?
A : What is the boy doing?
B : He is 	 in the pool.
다음 대화가 끝난 후 두 사람이 주문할 음식은?

다음 대화의 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 가장 적절한 것은?
A : Mr. Smith, can I go home early today?
B : Oh, you don’t look so good. What’s wrong?
A : 	.
choices: ② I have a high fever
③ I’m happy to hear that

questions.question:
다음 대화의 주제로 가장 적절한 것은?
A : What do you do in your free time?
B : I like to bake cookies. How about you?
A : I usually watch movies.

다음 홍보문을 보고 알 수 없는 것은?
Star Dance Club
◦ We practice K-pop dance every Friday.
◦ We need five new members.
★ To sign up, email the club president
at dance@school.kr.

다음 방송의 목적으로 가장 적절한 것은?
Good morning, everyone. Let me tell you some safety
rules for riding a bike in the park. First, put on a
helmet to protect your head. Second, wear bright colors
at night so that people can see you easily.
choices: ③ 공원 내 편의 시설 소개
④ 자전거 운행 시 안전 수칙 안내

questions.question: 다음 대화에서 B가 늦은 이유는?

Ocean Hotel에 관한 다음 글의 내용과 일치하지 않는 것은?
Ocean Hotel is next to the beach. Every room has a
view of the sea. Guests can eat fresh seafood at the
hotel restaurant. There are also free boat tours for all
guests.
choices: ② 모든 객실에서 바다를 볼 수 있다.
③ 식당에서 신선한 해산물을 먹을 수 있다.

questions.question:
다음 글의 흐름으로 보아 어울리지 않는 문장은?
I would like to introduce our new orchestra member, Sophie. ⓐ She 	 plays 	 the 	 violin. ⓑ She 	 has 	 lots 	 of
experience playing in orchestras. ⓒ The violin is smaller
than the guitar. ⓓ She has won many violin contests.
Let’s all welcome Sophie.

다음 글에서 Mike가 책을 빌리지 못한 이유로 가장 적절한
것은?
Mike had to read some books for his science project.
So, he went to the library yesterday. He found the
books 	 there. 	 However, 	 he 	 couldn’t 	 borrow 	 them
because he left his library card at home.
choices: ① 이미 너무 많은 책을 빌려서
③ 도서관 카드를 집에 두고 와서

questions.question:
그래프로 보아 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 가장 적절한 것은?
What type of music do students like the best?

다음 글에서 언급된 내용이 아닌 것은?
My name is David. This is my family photo. Here is
my younger sister, Christine. She is in the third grade.
Next 	 to 	 her, 	 my 	 parents 	 are 	 sitting 	 in 	 chairs. 	 My
father is a teacher, and my mother is a doctor. We
are a happy family.

다음 밑줄 친 them이 가리키는 것으로 가장 적절한 것은?
Here’s how to relax your eyes when they feel tired.
Close 	 your 	 eyes 	 and 	 press 	 them 	 gently 	 with 	 your
fingers. When you finish, cover your eyes with warm
towels. This will make your eyes feel more relaxed.

영화관에서 지켜야 할 사항으로 언급되지 않은 것은?
◦ Don’t talk loudly.
◦ Don’t use cell phones.
◦ Don’t throw trash on the floor.

다음 글의 주제로 가장 적절한 것은?
These days robots play many different roles. Some
robots take orders at restaurants. Others make coffee
at cafés. They also work as guides at airports. They
even talk to people as friends.

다음 글을 쓴 목적으로 가장 적절한 것은?
Hi, Sam. It’s me, Chris. I know we were going to
play soccer today. But it’s raining now, and I heard
that it will not stop until tonight. So, why don’t we
change the plan?

다음 글의 바로 뒤에 이어질 내용으로 가장 적절한 것은?
Do you like cheese? Making cheese at home is easy
and fun. It takes only 30 minutes. And you just need
some milk, lemon juice, and salt. Now, let’s take a look
at the steps to make cheese with these three things.
